title: Introduction
description: Introduction to the book Yoga Sutra of Master Patanjali.

title: The First Corner Stone
description: Introduction to the first chapter of the book - The Chapter on Meditation.

title: The Power of Compassion
description: Short review of how we can become whole in term of being.

title: To Become Whole
description: Practice of the mind to become whole in term of being.

title: The Seer
description: The experience of first time seeing the ultimate reality when we are in deep metation.

title: A Day in The Mind
description: The goal of Yoga is not to stop all thoughts. We simply want to stop the Great Mistake, and all the unhappiness it causes.

title: Pictures in The Mind
description: Imaginations and Recollections are just mental pictures in the mind without corresponded concrete outer object.

title: Approaching The Door
description: Stopping the Great Mistake requires constant practice, giving up attachments, and striving to be there - the first nirvana.

title: The Power of Daily Practice
description: Our spiritual practice must become a regular part of our day. The mind is infinitely powerful. We can learn to be good at anything, if only we give it an hour of two practices a day. But every day.

title: Attachment to Distraction
description: Giving up attachment to distraction consists of decision to gain control over craving for experiences, seen, or only heard of.

title: Attachment to Illusion
description: The worse attachment of all is to be attached to the idea that the things all around us exist out there on their own, concretely, in the sense that they don't depend on how we lead our life.

title: Meditation Traps
description: Praticing meditation without being infected by the Great Mistake can save our world. We need guidance from holy Masters and their blessings.

title: Karmic Seeds That Never Sprout
description: The factor that makes negative seeds sprout is simply seeing things the wrong way. When we practice meditation well and avoid meditation traps, we can prevent karmic seeds from sprouting.

title: The Five Powers
description: The powers we must first use: Awareness, Meditation, Wisdom, Belief, and Effort.

title: The Four Stages
description: On the Path of Preparation, we will pass through four stages which prepare us for te next path. These four stages are: Warmth, Peek, Mastery, and the Highest Object of All.

title: The Transcended Beings
description: And another way is to ask Transcended Beings for their blessing. A Trancended Being is an ordinary-extra person who is untouched by mental afflictions and by deeds.

title: Serve The Masters
description: It's a kind of magic that happens when we've found back our own Masters and commit ourselves to the joy of working closely with a spiritual guidance, serve the Masters and their sacred work.

title: The Highest of Prayers
description: Calling upon their names is the first of all prayers. We must repeat this prayers and think well upon the meaning. With this, we will gain the ability to focus the mind within, and to avoid all obstacles.

title: Beginning Obstacles
description: Unpleasantness of the body is obviously an obstacle but it's also a spiritual practice. It inspires us to work on what's really important in life, and makes us more humble and sympathic.
